name: Lyondell Chemical Company
description: LyondellBasell Industries N.V. is a leading global chemical company that creates solutions for everyday sustainable living. As one of the world's largest producers of polymers and a leader in polyolefin technologies, the company focuses on developing advanced materials and chemical products. With a strong commitment to innovation, LyondellBasell is actively investing in technologies to enable a circular and low-carbon economy. Headquartered in the Netherlands with significant operations in Houston, Texas, the company serves diverse markets including packaging, electronics, automotive, and construction, consistently driving progress through its global manufacturing and research capabilities.
